title: Sour Fluffy Algerian Onion Stir-fry
description: A savory and tangy dish perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring aromatic harissa paste, a sprinkle of tandoori masala for added flavor, and a tadka to awaken your taste buds.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: For best results, use sweet onions

ingredients.name: Harissa Paste
ingredients.notes: Red pepper paste from a jar or homemade

ingredients.name: Garam Masala Powder
ingredients.notes: Classic Indian spice blend, optional for extra depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Tandoori Masala Paste
ingredients.notes: Reddish-brown Indian curry paste, can be homemade or store-bought

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, season with salt and pepper, cook until translucent and slightly caramelized.
Stir in the lemon juice, harissa paste, garam masala powder, tandoori masala paste, paprika, and turmeric powder. Mix well to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and thickened.
Transfer to a serving dish, garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
